title: thelypteris perglandulifera
intro: Thelypteris perglandulifera, also known as the Fern-like plant, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Thelypteris perglandulifera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses.
